SelfHosted.description: The publisher's own node hosts the broker and holds the content keys

StandbyReplica.description: A publisher-run replica sharing the wrapping key (custody stays with the publisher)

EscrowFallback.description: A third-party (e.g. platform-run) fallback broker able to release the content key for this module

Online.description: Broker answered the most recent probe/heartbeat window

Degraded.description: Heartbeats are late or intermittently failing

Unreachable.description: Broker failed probing; paid listings behind it are unpurchasable

PUBLISHER_EPM_CID.description: IPFS CID of the publisher `$EPM` that operates this broker

PROVIDER_PEER_ID.description: libp2p peer id of the publisher node hosting the broker

PROTOCOL_ID.description:
libp2p protocol the broker answers on
(e.g. "/space-data-network/module-delivery/1.0.0")

MULTIFORMAT_ADDRESSES.description: Dialable multiformat addresses for the broker

BROKER_PUBLIC_KEY.description:
The broker's public key (from the key server's get_public_key) so the
buyer can pin it

SelfHosted.description: The publisher's own node hosts the broker and holds the content keys

StandbyReplica.description: A publisher-run replica sharing the wrapping key (custody stays with the publisher)

EscrowFallback.description: A third-party (e.g. platform-run) fallback broker able to release the content key for this module

Online.description: Broker answered the most recent probe/heartbeat window

Degraded.description: Heartbeats are late or intermittently failing

Unreachable.description: Broker failed probing; paid listings behind it are unpurchasable

LAST_HEARTBEAT_AT.description: Unix ms of the last successful probe/heartbeat

FIRST_SEEN_AT.description: Unix ms the store first saw this broker

UPDATED_AT.description: Unix ms this descriptor was last updated

SIGNATURE.description:
Ed25519 signature by the publisher `$EPM` over the self-attested endpoint
fields; re-verified by the store's live probe
